title: A small museum I visited
summary: Tell the story of a small, quiet museum you once visited.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a small museum you visited once. Describe what you saw and how you felt. Use past simple.
hintStarters: Last year, I visited a small museum in…
sampleText: Last year, I visited a small museum in Bucharest. The museum was in an old house on a narrow street. The entry was free. A kind woman at the door wrote my name in a book. The museum had only three small rooms. In the first room, I saw old photos of the city from a hundred years ago. The wooden floor made a soft noise when I walked. In the second room, there were letters and small toys from a family. In the third room, there was one old radio and a chair. I sat on the chair for a few minutes. There were no other people. The light from the window was soft, and the air smelled of paper. I felt very quiet inside. I read every sign slowly. When I left, the kind woman gave me a small card. The visit took only one hour, but I still remember it.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: wrote my name in a book
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: ghi tên tôi vào một cuốn sổ
cảm thấy rất tĩnh lặng bên trong

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Past simple for a finished trip
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Khi kể về một chuyến đi đã xong, dùng quá khứ đơn: 'I visited a small museum', 'I saw old photos', 'I sat on the chair'. Động từ bất quy tắc: see → saw, sit → sat, write → wrote.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: When telling about a finished trip, use the past simple: 'I visited a small museum', 'I saw old photos', 'I sat on the chair'. Irregular verbs: see → saw, sit → sat, write → wrote.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: 'There was' and 'There were'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: 'There was' đi với danh từ số ít: 'there was one old radio'. 'There were' đi với danh từ số nhiều: 'there were letters and small toys', 'There were no other people'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: 'There was' is used with singular nouns: 'there was one old radio'. 'There were' is used with plural nouns: 'there were letters and small toys', 'There were no other people'.

sampleTranslationVi: Năm ngoái, tôi đã đến thăm một bảo tàng nhỏ ở Bucharest. Bảo tàng nằm trong một ngôi nhà cũ trên một con phố hẹp. Vào cửa miễn phí. Một người phụ nữ tử tế ở cửa ghi tên tôi vào một cuốn sổ. Bảo tàng chỉ có ba phòng nhỏ. Trong phòng đầu, tôi thấy những tấm ảnh cũ về thành phố từ một trăm năm trước. Sàn gỗ kêu nhẹ khi tôi bước. Trong phòng thứ hai có thư và đồ chơi nhỏ của một gia đình. Trong phòng thứ ba có một cái đài cũ và một cái ghế. Tôi ngồi trên ghế vài phút. Không có ai khác. Ánh sáng từ cửa sổ dịu nhẹ, và không khí có mùi giấy. Tôi cảm thấy rất tĩnh lặng bên trong. Tôi đọc kỹ từng tấm bảng giải thích. Khi rời đi, người phụ nữ tử tế tặng tôi một tấm thiệp nhỏ. Chuyến thăm chỉ kéo dài một giờ, nhưng tôi vẫn nhớ nó.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I visited a small museum in Bucharest'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at the city in the first sentence.

mcQuestions.prompt: How many rooms did the museum have?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The museum had only three small rooms'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What did the writer see in the first room?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'In the first room, I saw old photos of the city from a hundred years ago'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for what was in the first room.

mcQuestions.prompt: What is the past simple of 'see'?
What was in the third room?
options: One old radio and a chair
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'In the third room, there was one old radio and a chair'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at the contents of the last room.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence uses 'there was / there were' correctly?
options: There was letters and small toys.
mcQuestions.hint: Match the singular/plural noun to 'was' or 'were'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What did the air smell of?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'the air smelled of paper'.

mcQuestions.prompt: How long did the visit take?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The visit took only one hour'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the length of the visit.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which past simple sentence is correct?
options: I sit on the chair for a few minutes.
I sitting on the chair for a few minutes.
I sat on the chair for a few minutes.
I sated on the chair for a few minutes.
mcQuestions.hint: Recall the irregular past form of 'sit'.

mcQuestions.prompt: How did the writer feel during the visit?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I felt very quiet inside'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the feeling word in the sentence about the writer.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do small museums sometimes feel more powerful than large ones? What can an empty room with one object teach us?
